signal_watch.title: Claude Sonnet 5 now available on Vercel AI Gateway
signal_watch.author: Vercel AI
signal_watch.summary: Claude Sonnet 5 from Anthropic is now available on AI Gateway . Sonnet 5 improves on Sonnet 4.6 across coding and agentic work, reaching outcomes on many tasks that previously needed an Opus model, at Sonnet pricing. The model is more agentic and follows instructions more closely. Document parsing and long-context memory use are also stronger. Sonnet 5 also uses an updated tokenizer, like the recent Opus models, which can map the same input to more tokens. Launch pricing of $

signal_watch.title: An expanded Vercel Agent: chat, investigations, and approved actions, now in public beta
signal_watch.author: Vercel AI
signal_watch.summary: Today, we're launching expanded capabilities for Vercel Agent in public beta. Vercel Agent now lives in your dashboard and can investigate production issues, answer questions about your projects, and take action on your behalf. Because Agent runs inside the platform that deploys and serves your app, it has access to the signals around it: deployments, logs, metrics, project configuration, usage, and connected repositories. That context is what turns a question into an answer
signal_watch.excerpt: Today, we're launching expanded capabilities for Vercel Agent in public beta. Vercel Agent now lives in your dashboard and can investigate production issues, answer questions about your projects, and take action on your behalf. Because Agent runs inside the platform that deploys and serves your app, it has access to the signals around it: deployments, logs, metrics, project configuration, usage, and connected repositories. That context is what turns a question into an answer

signal_watch.title: Vercel Open Source Program: Spring 2026 cohort
signal_watch.author: Vercel AI
signal_watch.summary: The world runs on open source software. The frameworks, libraries, and tools we rely on are made possible by communities that share ideas and build in the open. At Vercel, we want to help those communities thrive. That’s why we run the Vercel Open Source Program : a developer initiative that gives maintainers the resources and support they need to keep shipping and growing their projects. Four times a year, we welcome a new cohort of open source projects into the program. Mai

signal_watch.title: Vercel Services: Run full stack on Vercel
signal_watch.author: Vercel AI
signal_watch.summary: To a user, an app with a Next.js frontend and a FastAPI backend feels like one product, and the same should be true for the engineers who build it. Instead, the two pieces are often deployed across different clouds with different development and deployment workflows. Today we're introducing Vercel Services , which lets you run multiple frameworks in one Vercel Project. This unlocks: Atomic deployments: Your frontend, backend, and other services stay in sync and deploy or roll
signal_watch.excerpt: To a user, an app with a Next.js frontend and a FastAPI backend feels like one product, and the same should be true for the engineers who build it. Instead, the two pieces are often deployed across different clouds with different development and deployment workflows. Today we're introducing Vercel Services , which lets you run multiple frameworks in one Vercel Project. This unlocks: Atomic deployments: Your frontend, backend, and other services stay in sync and deploy or roll

signal_watch.title: Vercel and Shopify are rebuilding Hydrogen
signal_watch.author: Vercel AI
signal_watch.summary: Hydrogen made headless storefronts easy to ship, but not portable. At Vercel Ship 26 in New York, we announced that we are working with Shopify to rebuild it from the ground up, a shared bet on a more open web. The new version is open source and runtime agnostic, meaning it can run anywhere JavaScript does. You can build with Svelte , Nuxt , Next.js or even bring your own custom framework. Our strategy includes three layers: core, client and server. The core Core is the JavaS
signal_watch.excerpt: Hydrogen made headless storefronts easy to ship, but not portable. At Vercel Ship 26 in New York, we announced that we are working with Shopify to rebuild it from the ground up, a shared bet on a more open web. The new version is open source and runtime agnostic, meaning it can run anywhere JavaScript does. You can build with Svelte , Nuxt , Next.js or even bring your own custom framework. Our strategy includes three layers: core, client and server. The core Core is the JavaS

signal_watch.title: Vercel Agent has updated pricing
signal_watch.author: Vercel AI
signal_watch.summary: Vercel Agent pricing is changing. You no longer need to pre-load credits or manage a separate wallet for Vercel Agent. Instead of a $0.30 per-request fee, you now pay a Vercel Token Rate of $0.25 per million tokens, plus provider inference costs at the underlying token rate. The new Vercel Token Rate scales with the actual work each task requires. A quick question costs less than a deep investigation that reads your logs, deployments, configuration, and runtime data, spins up
signal_watch.excerpt: Vercel Agent pricing is changing. You no longer need to pre-load credits or manage a separate wallet for Vercel Agent. Instead of a $0.30 per-request fee, you now pay a Vercel Token Rate of $0.25 per million tokens, plus provider inference costs at the underlying token rate. The new Vercel Token Rate scales with the actual work each task requires. A quick question costs less than a deep investigation that reads your logs, deployments, configuration, and runtime data, spins up

signal_watch.author: Vercel AI
signal_watch.summary: Vercel Private Blob is now generally available for all plans. Store sensitive files like user-uploaded photos, invoices, and agent memory, and control exactly who can read them. hot_rank.title: Vercel Services: Run full stack on Vercel
hot_rank.author: Vercel AI
hot_rank.summary: To a user, an app with a Next.js frontend and a FastAPI backend feels like one product, and the same should be true for the engineers who build it. Instead, the two pieces are often deployed across different clouds with different development and deployment workflows. Today we're introducing Vercel Services , which lets you run multiple frameworks in one Vercel Project. This unlocks: Atomic deployments: Your frontend, backend, and other services stay in sync and deploy or roll

hot_rank.title: Vercel and Shopify are rebuilding Hydrogen
hot_rank.author: Vercel AI
hot_rank.summary: Hydrogen made headless storefronts easy to ship, but not portable. At Vercel Ship 26 in New York, we announced that we are working with Shopify to rebuild it from the ground up, a shared bet on a more open web. The new version is open source and runtime agnostic, meaning it can run anywhere JavaScript does. You can build with Svelte , Nuxt , Next.js or even bring your own custom framework. Our strategy includes three layers: core, client and server. The core Core is the JavaS

hot_rank.title: Vercel Agent has updated pricing
hot_rank.author: Vercel AI
hot_rank.summary: Vercel Agent pricing is changing. You no longer need to pre-load credits or manage a separate wallet for Vercel Agent. Instead of a $0.30 per-request fee, you now pay a Vercel Token Rate of $0.25 per million tokens, plus provider inference costs at the underlying token rate. The new Vercel Token Rate scales with the actual work each task requires. A quick question costs less than a deep investigation that reads your logs, deployments, configuration, and runtime data, spins up
hot_rank.excerpt: Vercel Agent pricing is changing. You no longer need to pre-load credits or manage a separate wallet for Vercel Agent. Instead of a $0.30 per-request fee, you now pay a Vercel Token Rate of $0.25 per million tokens, plus provider inference costs at the underlying token rate. The new Vercel Token Rate scales with the actual work each task requires. hot_rank.title: Vercel Private Blob is now generally available
hot_rank.author: Vercel AI
hot_rank.summary: Vercel Private Blob is now generally available for all plans. Store sensitive files like user-uploaded photos, invoices, and agent memory, and control exactly who can read them. Private stores, Signed URLs, and OIDC authentication all graduate from beta with this release. Vercel Private Blob uses the same Blob API as public blobs. hot_rank.author: Vercel AI
hot_rank.summary: You can now deploy multiple frontends and backends together within a single Vercel project. clusters.title: Claude Sonnet 5 now available on Vercel AI Gateway
clusters.summary: Claude Sonnet 5 from Anthropic is now available on AI Gateway . Sonnet 5 improves on Sonnet 4.6 across coding and agentic work, reaching outcomes on many tasks that previously needed an Opus model, at Sonnet pricing. The model is more agentic and follows instructions more closely. Document parsing and long-context memory use are also stronger. Sonnet 5 also uses an updated tokenizer, like the recent Opus models, which can map the same input to more tokens. Launch pricing of $

clusters.title: Announcements Jun 30, 2026 Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists, is now available Claude Science is a customizable app that integrates the tools and packages researchers most often use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources.
clusters.summary: Newsroom \ Anthropic · Announcements Jun 30, 2026 Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists, is now available Claude Science is a customizable app that integrates the tools and packages researchers most often use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources.

clusters.title: An expanded Vercel Agent: chat, investigations, and approved actions, now in public beta
clusters.summary: Today, we're launching expanded capabilities for Vercel Agent in public beta. Vercel Agent now lives in your dashboard and can investigate production issues, answer questions about your projects, and take action on your behalf. Because Agent runs inside the platform that deploys and serves your app, it has access to the signals around it: deployments, logs, metrics, project configuration, usage, and connected repositories. That context is what turns a question into an answer

clusters.title: Vercel Open Source Program: Spring 2026 cohort
clusters.summary: The world runs on open source software. The frameworks, libraries, and tools we rely on are made possible by communities that share ideas and build in the open. At Vercel, we want to help those communities thrive. That’s why we run the Vercel Open Source Program : a developer initiative that gives maintainers the resources and support they need to keep shipping and growing their projects. Four times a year, we welcome a new cohort of open source projects into the program. Mai
